section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has a history of depression.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Past medical history is typically documented in the subjective/history portion; here it is listed among active assessments, which is more of an organizational issue than a misleading diagnostic statement.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has a history of chronic back pain.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Chronic back pain as a historical problem belongs more appropriately in the subjective/history section; its placement in Assessment is a mild organizational issue.
Smoking status is part of social history, which fits better in the subjective section; in Assessment it is somewhat misplaced but not strongly misleading.
